## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Sarah Krasnik Bedell's potential role at growthx.ai and explore company structure, culture, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is rapidly growing (45 to 100 employees by year-end) with a unique "Managing Director" role overseeing customer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Company currently functions as an agency but aims to transition to a product-based model](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Emphasis on async remote culture, productivity, and "work in the open" philosophy](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Challenges in scaling quickly while maintaining culture and effective onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Roles

  - [Current headcount: 45 full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Hierarchy: Directors \> Pod Leads (Managing Editors) \> Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Aiming for 70 customer-facing employees by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Managing Director role: Strategy-focused, overseeing multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Compensation model in development, likely including variable component based on net revenue retention](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Growth and Scaling Challenges

  - [Rapid growth from 15 to 100 employees in previous year at Bridget's former company](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Focus on improving onboarding and people management](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Plans for a 3-week boot camp for content managers](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Exploring unique culture-building tactics (e.g., generous severance to encourage only committed employees)](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Company Culture and Work Philosophy

  - [Async remote culture inspired by Basecamp and Netflix](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Emphasis on "work in the open" and high productivity](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Flexible approach to role definition and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Exploring best practices for managing international teams](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Product Development and Future Plans

  - [Current focus on agency model, but aim to transition to product-based offerings](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Need for more engineers to build scalable products](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Potential expansion beyond content into areas like recruiting tools](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Balancing focus on current market with potential diversification](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

### Sarah's Background and Aspirations

  - [Previous experience as a data engineer, transitioning to marketing](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Managed teams of 2-3 people in North America](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Seeking roles with growth potential and management opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Values flexibility, creativity, and the ability to test new ideas](https://fathom.video/share/UJ1neu-ZQivkeMXVgb1V2jHRVUgpirmX?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Next Steps

  - Sarah to discuss product transition plans and day-to-day role details with Marcel
  - Explore potential expansion beyond content services in future conversations
  - Sarah to review benefits information if discussions progress
  - Continue refining company structure and onboarding processes as growthx.ai scales
